## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (rule, prompt, decision logic)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Sample / example
- [ ] Other

## Operating Mode

- [ ] Repo-Driven
- [ ] Spec-Driven
- [ ] Both / N/A

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated (if adding rules or prompts)
- [ ] YAML/JSON valid
- [ ] No Azure/GCP logic (AWS-only scope)
- [ ] Samples conform to finding-schema and output-consistency (if adding samples)
